{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = United Worlds
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kareia]] is part of the [[United Worlds]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
